hero.title: Training that fits your actual life
hero.subtitle: Classes of eight, coaches who know your name and your bad knee, and programs that start where you are — not where an app thinks you should be.
hero.imageAlt: Small group training session with a coach

services.title: Programs
services.subtitle: Pick a track — every session is still coached to your level.

items.title: Small-group strength
items.description: Our core program: barbell and dumbbell strength training in groups of eight, with a coach correcting your form every session. Three levels, so beginners never share a bar with powerlifters.

items.title: Personal training
items.description: One-on-one coaching for specific goals — rehab, sport prep, or just privacy while you learn.

items.title: Conditioning
items.description: 45 minutes of intervals that scale to your fitness, not a leaderboard.

items.title: Mobility & recovery
items.description: The unglamorous class your back will thank you for. Great alongside strength work.

about.title: About the studio
about.subtitle: We opened Forma because big gyms coach nobody.
about.body: After ten years coaching in commercial gyms, Ana and Vuk opened Studio Forma in 2019 with one idea: caps on class size make coaching possible. Eight people per class means every rep gets seen. Our members range from 19 to 67, and the median member has been here over two years — retention we're prouder of than any before-and-after photo.

items.title: Real coaching
items.description: Every class is coached, not supervised. Form gets fixed, weights get adjusted.

items.title: Levels, not chaos
items.description: Beginner, intermediate, advanced tracks — you're never in over your head.

items.title: Book from your phone
items.description: Reserve or cancel class spots up to two hours before.

items.title: No contracts
items.description: Monthly memberships you can pause or cancel anytime.

items.title: Injuries respected
items.description: Tell us about your shoulder — every exercise has a substitute.

items.title: 6 AM to 9 PM
items.description: Classes before work, after work, and Saturday mornings.

items.name: Tijana P.
items.text: I'd quit four gyms before this one. The difference is simple: someone actually notices whether I show up and how I move.

items.name: Miloš V.
items.text: I was worried I'd be the old guy slowing everyone down. Turns out half my class is my age and my deadlift is now double my starting one.

items.name: Katarina J.
items.text: Came in after a knee operation with a physio's clearance. Every session was adapted, nothing was skipped, and a year later I forget which knee it was.

pricing.title: Memberships
pricing.subtitle: All memberships are monthly — pause or cancel anytime. First class is free.

plans.name: 2× per week
plans.description: Eight classes a month, any program.

plans.name: Unlimited
plans.description: Train as often as you like, all programs included.

items.question: I'm completely out of shape. Can I start?
items.answer: That's exactly who the beginner track is for. Your first month uses lighter loads while a coach teaches you the basic movements properly. Nobody is watching you — everyone else is too busy with their own bar.

items.question: How does the free trial work?
items.answer: Pick any beginner-friendly class, come 15 minutes early, and a coach walks you through everything. No payment details, no sales pitch afterwards — if it's for you, you'll know.

items.question: What if I have an old injury?
items.answer: Tell your coach at the first class. Every exercise in our programs has substitutes, and if you're post-rehab we're happy to coordinate with your physiotherapist.

items.question: Can I really pause my membership?
items.answer: Yes — from the app, in two taps, for two weeks to three months. Travel and life happen; a membership shouldn't punish you for it.

cta.title: Your first class is free
cta.subtitle: Come try a session — worst case, you get a good workout out of it.

contact.title: Come by
contact.subtitle: Ground floor, plenty of parking, showers on site.

footer.description: Small-group and personal training in Novi Sad.
